title: Your website doesn’t rank (and AI ignores it)
body: Your Wix or GoDaddy site wasn’t built for local search — and it definitely wasn’t built for AI. Google can barely find you. ChatGPT doesn’t even know you exist.

title: You have no video (or bad video)
body: Pages with video are far more likely to reach Google page one. But video agencies charge $5,000+, and that AI video you tried? It looks robotic — customers quickly lose trust when they spot low-quality AI-generated content.

title: Agencies only do half the job
body: Your SEO agency optimizes for Google but ignores AI search completely. They’ve never mentioned ChatGPT, Perplexity, or voice search. Meanwhile, a growing share of younger consumers are already using AI tools like ChatGPT instead of Google to find local businesses.

title: You don’t have time for this
body: You run a business. You’re serving clients, managing your team, and answering calls. Learning SEO, AEO, and video editing isn’t your job — and it shouldn’t have to be.
